name: Noise Gate (audio chain v2)
author: KB2UKA
description: Voice noise gate for the Zeus audio chain. Peak-envelope detector with built-in 3 dB open/close hysteresis to prevent chatter, configurable hold time so the gate doesn't clamp shut between syllables, separate attack and release gain-slew time constants, adjustable range (depth of attenuation when closed), and an output gain trim for level-matching downstream blocks. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency. Live threshold-rail viz with state pill (OPEN / HOLD / CLOSED), vertical IN / OUT peak meters, brass-plate header with the audio-chain bypass switch.
